property.name: value
property.label: Value
property.description: Specifies the value of the selected radio button.

property.name: label
property.label: Label
property.description: Text label for the radio group.

property.name: required
property.label: Required
property.description: If present, a radio button must be selected before the form can be submitted.

property.name: disabled
property.label: Disabled
property.description: If present, the radio group is disabled and users cannot interact with it.

property.name: radioType
property.label: Type
property.description: The style of the radio group. Options are radio or button. The default is radio.

property.name: variant
property.label: Variant
property.description: The variant changes the appearance of the radio group. Accepted variants include standard, label-hidden, label-inline, and label-stacked. This value defaults to standard. Use label-hidden to hide the label but make it available to assistive technology. Use label-inline to horizontally align the label and radio group. Use label-stacked to place the label above the radio group.

property.name: objectAPIName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: SObject API Name that the field picklist is on

property.name: recordTypeDeveloperName
property.label: RecordType Developer Name
property.description: If recordtypes are in use on this object please provide the developer Name to ensure the correct picklist values are returned
